identification.title: HarvestStat Africa - Harmonized Subnational Crop Statistics for Sub-Saharan Africa

consent.consent_scope: Aggregate subnational statistics from national and regional sources; original data collected under country/source institutional agreements (e.g. FEWS-NET, FAO).

permitted_use.use_restrictions: CC0 (Public Domain). No restrictions; attribution appreciated. See Dryad and Nature Scientific Data descriptor.

provenance.collector_org: HarvestStat / CIRAD; data derived from USAID FEWS-NET and harmonized

audit.notes: Governance record filled for DSA 2026 workshop application. Source: Dryad, Nature Sci Data 2025. Aggregate statistics only; no individual/household data.
